Package org.apache.juneau.http

Class HttpResponses

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpResponses
public final class HttpResponses extends Object
Static factory methods for creating pre-defined HTTP response and exception objects.

Import statically for clean DSL-style usage in REST server code:

import static org.apache.juneau.http.HttpResponses.*; @RestGet("/users/{id}") public User getUser(@Path String id) { User user = userService.find(id); if (user == null) throw notFound("User not found: " + id); return user; }

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1
